data.body:
COMPLETED. Added EXCLUDED_SYNC_TYPES = frozenset({'session_log'}) to rebar_reconciler/config.py and filtered it in compute_outbound_mutations() (both the absent-GET pre-selection loop and the main mutation loop), alongside the existing excluded-status check. Used a lazy _load_config() sibling-loader mirroring the existing _load_adf/_load_comment_limits pattern (outbound_differ may be imported via spec_from_file_location without package context).

session_log deliberately remains ABSENT from _LOCAL_TO_JIRA_TYPE (leak-loud invariant). Confirmed bridge_fsck shows no session_log entries (logs are never bound).

Tests: tests/unit/rebar_reconciler/diffing/test_outbound_differ_session_log_exclusion.py — session_log in EXCLUDED_SYNC_TYPES; absent from _LOCAL_TO_JIRA_TYPE; unbound session_log yields zero mutations while a sibling task still CREATEs (surgical); bound session_log also yields zero. Full offline tier: 2065 passed, 0 failed. ruff clean.
